name: sunset-nexus
description: Fleet nexus for node registration, federation, and discovery. Maintains the canonical agent registry and routes A2A task negotiation between fleet members.

skills.name: Node Registration
skills.description: Register a new fleet node with its capabilities, agent cards, and endpoint addresses
examples: Register node alpha-7 with 4 GPUs and thermal budget 85°C

skills.name: Federation Sync
skills.description: Synchronize fleet topology, agent registry, and consensus state across federated nodes
examples: Sync federation state with nodes beta-1 through beta-4

skills.name: Agent Discovery
skills.description: Discover agents by skill, capability, or identity across the federated fleet
examples: Find all agents with the 'drift_correction' skill

skills.name: Task Routing
skills.description: Route an A2A task to the best-matching agent based on capability scoring and load
examples: Route a compile task to the least-loaded compiler agent
